_comment: Official Azure MCP Server (@azure/mcp), stdio. Read-only is the --read-only flag (filters the tool list to read-only operations; blocks writes across all namespaces). Add --namespace <service> (e.g. monitor, sql, kusto) to narrow scope. Authenticate with az login / DefaultAzureCredential as an identity with a Reader RBAC role (see SETUP.md); no secrets in committed config. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
